violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonia sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: refrigerator. kitchen carts storage bin on cart in back area New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025

The floors especially beneath the 3 bay sink have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025
The grease trap has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025

The walls in the kitchen around the 3 bay sink and hand washing sink are constructed of painted drywall. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025
The painted drywall near the 3 bay sink is in poor repair, with chips missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2024

Eggs observed held at 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonia sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024

The walls in the kitchen around the 3 bay sink are constructed of painted drywall. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025
The 3 bay sink is in poor repair, with the cold water handle missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2024
The painted drywall near the 3 bay sink is in poor repair, with chips missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2024

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of black soil residue and biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024
Food observed stored on the floor in the back pantry area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2024
Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils are not stored inverted. Utensil (whisk) displayed with the lip contact surface up. . New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

Single service items observed stored on the floor in the back pantry area. Single service items observed stored on shelves that are not at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2024

The floors in the kitchen especially below the 3 bay sink have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024
The 3 bay sink is in poor repair, missing the cold water handle. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2024

The walls in the kitchen around the 3 bay sink and hand sink are constructed of painted drywall. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025
The painted drywall near the 3 bay sink is in poor repair, with chips missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025
